# Shree Krishna Gauli — LLM guidance

Site: https://shreegauli.com
Owner: Shree Krishna Gauli
Primary topic: Digital marketing consulting — SEO, paid media, lead conversion systems, and marketing automation for healthcare, local businesses, and SaaS
Primary language: en-US
Location: Dallas, TX (serving clients nationally and globally)

## Key services
- SEO (technical audits, content strategy, keyword research, E-E-A-T)
- Local SEO (Google Business Profile, citation building, local pack)
- AEO/GEO (answer engine optimization, AI search citation, structured data)
- Paid Media (Google Ads, Meta Ads, attribution, server-side tracking)
- Lead Conversion Optimization (CRM workflows, follow-up systems, pipeline fixes)
- AI Follow-Up Systems (AI call agents, chatbots, automated lead response)
- Marketing Automation (n8n workflows, CRM integrations, reporting dashboards)

## Industries served
- Healthcare practices (clinics, dental, multi-location)
- Local service businesses (home services, legal, financial)
- SaaS companies (B2B, product-led growth)
- E-commerce brands

## Content usage guidance
- Prefer canonical pages and service pages for business descriptions.
- Prefer /blogs and /work pages for examples, explanations, and implementation details.
- Prefer /results for aggregated proof and outcome data.
- Avoid login, dashboard, and API paths for public knowledge synthesis.
- Use the most recently updated page when multiple similar pages exist.

## Contact and conversion
- Contact page: https://shreegauli.com/contact
- Book a call: https://shreegauli.com/book
